title: Amethyst's Nether [LEGACY]
description: Legacy version of the Amethyst's Nether
body:
This pack transforms Nether into a different, yet similar environment, with new terrain, 7 new sub-biomes, and some changes to vanilla ones.

<details>
<summary>New terrain</summary>

Now Nether has less space between bottom and ceiling and mostly plain terrain. 
Lava oceans were replaced with old-new nether wastes.


</details>


<details>
<summary>Biomes changes</summary>

 - **Nether Wastes**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/f2106352fee558343c1063afa8d69ec66194aae0.png)

     - Now this biome is full of lava lakes, magma and basalt. Blazes and ghasts spawn here, and ancient debris generate on the ceiling among basalt stalactites.

- **Basalt Deltas**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/b9b32cbaf790f35cd19e5d1e1c56e6078b778a48.png)
     - As usual, but with basalt stalactites, blazes, gilded blackstone, and without magma cubes. The only place where you can find a glowstone.

- **Soul Sand Valley**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/760a95305f0ad3ff345ea17ec71937849dff7ed7.png)
     - Added nether warts.


</details>


<details>
<summary>New sub-biomes </summary>


- **Crimson Plains**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/52ca38b5bbd8ea890a9b0390dfafaf32a20baf1d.png)
     - A lot of empty space for you to build, vines weeping from the ceiling, hoglins, and some piglins.


- **Warped Plains**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/0a2cc1f3302383d05c69ee695ab474eabe9410a1.png)
     - Like warped forest, but less trees and more twisting vines.


- **Crimson Fissures**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/a8ab085a52827308f22c4325d91c95b502d4b3e6.png)
     - The place of cracks in the ground that contain gold ore.


- **Warped Fissures**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/0bafc14e9c9f0e152886c76c268ad844561765dc.png)
     - Same as crimson fissures biome, but with quartz instead of gold.


- **Soul Sand Deltas**:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qk2EXq3Q/images/97226588072657cfaf2663319f30bc184e726bf3.png)
     - The biome between soul sand valleys and basalt deltas. Here reside hordes of skeletons and wither skeletons.


- **Crimson Deltas**:
     - Mix of basalt deltas and crimson biomes. Contains lava pools, basalt columns and magma cubes.


- **Warped Deltas**:
     - Place perfect for striders to live.




</details>



<details>
<summary>Potential important questions</summary>

### Is it compatible with (pack/mod name)?
If it intervenes Nether terrain generation and biome distribution -- **NO**.

### Will my world corrupt if i delete this pack from it?
**YES**. Make sure to make backups before installing/deleting pack.


</details>
